title: Host creates a new session and sees join code with no player mounted
description: Verifies a host can sign up, create a new session from the host dashboard, and land in the host session view with a visible join code and no mounted YouTube player on a fresh session.
category: Host Session View — Live Layout and Live Feed

steps.description: Navigate to /host/auth
Switch the auth form to sign up mode
Fill in the email field with host+tc001@example.com
Fill in the password field with ValidPass123!
Submit the auth form
Create a new session from the host dashboard
Verify the host session view shows a join code or invite code for participants to join
Verify no YouTube player iframe is displayed on the fresh session

title: Participant completes pre-join and enters live session with guest identity persisted
description: Verifies a guest can submit a display name on the pre-join screen, persist guest UUID and display name to localStorage, and land in the participant live session view.

steps.description: Navigate to /host/auth
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the host authentication form
Click the control to create a new session
Wait for the host session view to display a join code
Copy the join code value shown on the host session view
Navigate to the participant pre-join screen for that join code
Fill a valid display name into the name field
Submit to enter the live session
Verify the participant live session view is displayed
Verify guest identity values are present in localStorage under the upnext.guest namespace

title: Upvote a queued track and see vote state and ordering update
description: This test verifies a participant can upvote a queued track and the UI reflects the updated vote state and reorders the queue accordingly.

steps.description: Navigate to /host/auth
Fill {{LOGIN_USER}} into the email field
Fill {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}} into the password field
Submit the host authentication form
Create a new session from the host dashboard
Copy the join code from the host session view
Navigate to /session/{CODE}/join using the copied join code
Fill a valid display name into the display name field
Continue into the live session
Add a track to the queue using the add-track flow available in the participant session
Toggle upvote on the queued track
Verify the queued track shows the upvoted state and an updated vote count
Verify the queue ordering reflects the upvote prioritization

title: Participant adds a track using keyboard-navigated search suggestions
description: Verifies a participant can add a track by typing a search query, navigating suggestions with arrow keys, and pressing Enter to add to the queue.
category: Participant Live Session — Add Track (search and URLs)

steps.description: Navigate to /host/auth
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the host authentication form
Click the control to create a new session
Wait for the host session view to display a join code
Copy the join code value shown on the host session view
Navigate to the participant pre-join screen for that join code
Fill a valid display name into the name field
Submit to enter the live session
Fill a common search query into the add-to-queue input
Press ArrowDown
Press Enter
Verify the queue updates to include a newly added track

title: Participant join via full invite URL proceeds to pre-join then live session
description: Verifies a participant can paste a full invite URL into the Join Room modal, pass pre-validation, enter a display name, and reach the participant live session view.

steps.description: Navigate to /host/auth
Switch the auth form to sign up mode
Fill in the email field with host+tc005@example.com
Fill in the password field with ValidPass123!
Submit the auth form
Create a new session from the host dashboard
Copy the invite link shown in the host session view
Navigate to /
Open the Join Room modal
Fill the join input with the copied full invite URL
Submit the join form to proceed to the pre-join screen
Fill a valid display name into the display name field
Submit the display name to enter the live session
Verify the participant lands in the live session view with session controls and content displayed

title: Host stops a live session and sees ended recap
description: Verifies that a host can stop an active session from Settings and the host view transitions into an ended recap state that shows session summary information and prevents further session stopping actions.
category: Host Settings Modal — Stop Session and Ended Recap

steps.description: Navigate to /host/auth
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the host authentication form
Create a new session from the host dashboard
Open the host session view for the newly created session
Open Settings
Trigger Stop Session
Verify the host view displays an ended session recap state with participants and songs played summaries
Verify the Stop Session control is not available in the ended recap state

title: Participant can join via landing modal using a valid 6-character code
description: Verifies a guest can open the landing join modal, enter a valid 6-character code for a fresh session, and reach the participant pre-join screen.
category: Join Room via Landing Modal (6-char code)

steps.description: Navigate to /host/auth
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Trigger hosting a new session
Copy the join code shown in the host session view
Navigate to /
Open the Join Room modal
Fill the join input with the copied 6-character code
Continue to join
Verify the participant pre-join screen for that code is displayed

title: Host creates a new live session from the dashboard
description: Verifies an authenticated host can create a fresh session from the dashboard and lands on the host session view with a join code visible.

steps.description: Navigate to /host/auth
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Trigger hosting a new session
Verify the host lands on the live host session view and a join code is displayed

title: Host can open Settings and create a new session from the host session view
description: Verifies the host can use Settings to create a new session and is navigated to a new host session view with a new join code after seeing a pending Creating state.
category: Host Settings Modal — Create New Session

steps.description: Navigate to /host/auth
Switch the auth form to sign up mode
Fill in the email field with host+tc003@example.com
Fill in the password field with ValidPass123!
Submit the auth form
Create a new session from the host dashboard
Open the session settings
Trigger create new session
Wait for the creating session pending state to complete
Verify the host is on a new host session view with a join code visible

title: Log in as an existing host and reach the authenticated dashboard
description: Verifies an existing host can log in with valid credentials and sees the authenticated dashboard.

steps.description: Navigate to /host/auth
Ensure the login view is active
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Verify the authenticated host dashboard is displayed

title: Create a host account and reach the authenticated dashboard
description: Verifies a new host can sign up with valid details and is taken to the authenticated dashboard on success.

steps.description: Navigate to /host/auth
Switch to the sign-up view
Fill in the display name field with Test Host
Fill in the email field with testhost+signup1@example.com
Fill in the password field with ValidPassword123!
Submit the sign-up form
Verify the authenticated host dashboard is displayed

title: Participant joins a room from landing modal using a full invite URL
description: Verifies a guest can paste a full invite URL in the landing Join Room modal and proceed to the participant pre-join screen for that room code.
category: Join Room via Landing Modal (full invite URL)

steps.description: Navigate to /
Click the control to open the Join Room modal
Fill a valid full invite URL into the join input
Submit the join modal
Verify the participant pre-join screen is displayed for the extracted room code

title: Host sees live layout sections on the host session view
description: Verifies the host session view renders the core live layout sections needed to run a session (live feed, queue, and invite panel).
category: Host Session View — Live Layout and Live Feed

steps.description: Navigate to /host/auth
Switch the auth form to sign up mode
Fill in the email field with host+tc002@example.com
Fill in the password field with ValidPass123!
Submit the auth form
Create a new session from the host dashboard
Verify the live feed area is displayed
Verify the queue and invite panel are displayed

title: Participant adds a track by submitting a YouTube URL
description: Verifies a participant can paste a valid YouTube URL and add it to the queue in the live session view.
category: Participant Live Session — Add Track (search and URLs)

steps.description: Navigate to /host/auth
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the host authentication form
Click the control to create a new session
Wait for the host session view to display a join code
Copy the join code value shown on the host session view
Navigate to the participant pre-join screen for that join code
Fill a valid display name into the name field
Submit to enter the live session
Fill a valid YouTube video URL into the add-to-queue input
Submit the add-track action
Verify the queue updates to include a newly added track

title: Host sees a previous sessions list with badges and participant counts
description: Verifies the host dashboard shows a previous sessions list with status indicators and participant counts after authentication.

steps.description: Navigate to /host/auth
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Verify the previous sessions list is displayed with session status indicators and participant counts

title: Host opens a live session from the previous sessions list
description: Verifies the host can open an active session from the previous sessions list and lands on the host session view.

steps.description: Navigate to /host/auth
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Trigger hosting a new session
Click the navigation control to return to the host dashboard
Open the most recent live session from the previous sessions list
Verify the host lands on the live host session view

title: Change display name and see it update in header and People list
description: This test verifies a participant can update their display name to a valid value and the new name appears in the session header and People list.

steps.description: Navigate to /host/auth
Fill {{LOGIN_USER}} into the email field
Fill {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}} into the password field
Submit the host authentication form
Create a new session from the host dashboard
Copy the join code from the host session view
Navigate to /session/{CODE}/join using the copied join code
Fill a valid display name into the display name field
Continue into the live session
Open the edit display name dialog
Replace the name with Unique Guest Name 1
Save the new display name
Open the People view in the participant sidebar
Verify the participant header reflects the updated display name
Verify the People list includes the updated display name

title: Participant switches between History and People and sees Host badge
description: Verifies a participant can switch to History and People views and sees an empty history state plus a members list with the host indicated by a Host badge.

steps.description: Navigate to /host/auth
Switch the auth form to sign up mode
Fill in the email field with host+tc004@example.com
Fill in the password field with ValidPass123!
Submit the auth form
Create a new session from the host dashboard
Copy the join code shown in the host session view
Navigate to /
Open the Join Room modal
Fill the join input with the copied join code
Submit the join form to proceed to the pre-join screen
Fill a valid display name into the display name field
Submit the display name to enter the live session
Switch to the History view
Switch to the People view
Verify the members list is displayed and a Host badge is shown for the host user
Verify the History view shows an empty state when no tracks have been played

title: Fresh host session does not mount playback controls before a video is set
description: Verifies a newly created host session starts with playback controls disabled or absent until a current video is selected.

steps.description: Navigate to /host/auth
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Trigger hosting a new session
Verify playback controls are disabled or not shown because no track is currently playing

title: Host opens an ended room from the previous sessions list after stopping a session
description: Verifies the host can stop a session, return to the dashboard, and then open the ended session from the previous sessions list.

steps.description: Navigate to /host/auth
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Trigger hosting a new session
Open the session settings
Stop the session
Click the navigation control to return to the host dashboard
Open the most recent ended session from the previous sessions list
Verify the host can view the ended session state/recap for that room

title: Participant pre-join shows room summary information
description: Verifies the pre-join screen for a valid code displays the room host information and current listener count.

steps.description: Navigate to /host/auth
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the host authentication form
Click the control to create a new session
Wait for the host session view to display a join code
Copy the join code value shown on the host session view
Navigate to the participant pre-join screen for that join code
Verify the room host information and listener count are displayed

title: Host sees a creating state while session creation is pending
description: Verifies the host sees a transient creating/pending state while a new session is being created from the dashboard.

steps.description: Navigate to /host/auth
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Trigger hosting a new session
Verify a creating/pending state is shown for session creation

title: Copy invite link from Invite Friends modal and close the modal
description: This test verifies a participant can open the Invite Friends modal, copy the invite link with a temporary Copied state that resets, and close the modal.

steps.description: Navigate to /host/auth
Fill {{LOGIN_USER}} into the email field
Fill {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}} into the password field
Submit the host authentication form
Create a new session from the host dashboard
Copy the join code from the host session view
Navigate to /session/{CODE}/join using the copied join code
Fill a valid display name into the display name field
Continue into the live session
Open the Invite Friends modal
Click the control to copy the invite link
Wait for the copied confirmation state to appear
Wait for the copy control to reset back to its default state
Close the Invite Friends modal via the close control
Verify the Invite Friends modal is no longer visible

title: Log out from the host dashboard back to the auth gate
description: Verifies an authenticated host can log out and returns to the login/sign-up form.

steps.description: Navigate to /host/auth
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Trigger the logout action
Verify the auth gate login/sign-up form is displayed

title: Host can create another new session from the host session settings
description: Verifies the host can use settings from an existing host session to create a brand new session and sees a new join code afterward.

steps.description: Navigate to /host/auth
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Trigger hosting a new session
Open the session settings
Create a new session from settings
Verify the host remains in a host session view and a (new) join code is displayed

title: Participant sees an error toast when submitting an invalid or unresolvable track URL
description: Verifies submitting an invalid or unresolvable track URL shows an error toast and does not add a new item to the queue.
category: Participant Live Session — Add Track (search and URLs)

steps.description: Navigate to /host/auth
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the host authentication form
Click the control to create a new session
Wait for the host session view to display a join code
Copy the join code value shown on the host session view
Navigate to the participant pre-join screen for that join code
Fill a valid display name into the name field
Submit to enter the live session
Fill an invalid track URL into the add-to-queue input
Submit the add-track action
Verify an error toast is displayed
Verify no new queue item is added

title: Participant cannot proceed on pre-join with an invalid room code
description: Verifies the pre-join screen displays a not-found message for an invalid code and does not allow entering the live session.

steps.description: Navigate to the participant pre-join screen for an invalid join code
Verify a session-not-found message is displayed

title: Reject empty or whitespace-only display name change with a toast
description: This test verifies saving an empty or whitespace-only display name is rejected and an error toast is shown while the current name remains unchanged.

steps.description: Navigate to /host/auth
Fill {{LOGIN_USER}} into the email field
Fill {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}} into the password field
Submit the host authentication form
Create a new session from the host dashboard
Copy the join code from the host session view
Navigate to /session/{CODE}/join using the copied join code
Fill a valid display name into the display name field
Continue into the live session
Open the edit display name dialog
Replace the name with whitespace-only text
Save the new display name
Verify an invalid-name error toast is visible
Verify the participant header still shows the previous display name

title: Join modal shows session-not-found error for a valid-looking but nonexistent code
description: Verifies the landing Join Room modal shows a session-not-found inline error when a valid 6-character code does not correspond to any session.
category: Join Room via Landing Modal (6-char code)

steps.description: Navigate to /
Open the Join Room modal
Fill the join input with a valid 6-character code that was not created in this test run
Continue to join
Verify a session-not-found inline error is displayed

title: Participant join modal rejects empty or whitespace-only input
description: Verifies the Join Room modal prevents proceeding when the join input is empty or only whitespace and shows a validation error.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Open the Join Room modal
Fill the join input with whitespace-only text
Submit the join form
Verify a join validation error is visible and the user remains in the join modal

title: Block login with invalid password
description: Verifies entering an incorrect password shows an invalid-credentials toast and does not log the host in.

steps.description: Navigate to /host/auth
Ensure the login view is active
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with WrongPassword123!
Submit the login form
Verify an invalid credentials toast is visible
Verify the auth gate login/sign-up form is still displayed

title: Join modal rejects invalid or unparseable input
description: Verifies the landing Join Room modal prevents continuing with invalid/unparseable join input and shows an inline validation error.
category: Join Room via Landing Modal (6-char code)

steps.description: Navigate to /
Open the Join Room modal
Fill the join input with an invalid/unparseable value
Continue to join
Verify an inline validation error is displayed and the user remains in the join modal

title: Join Room modal rejects an unparseable or code-less input
description: Verifies the Join Room modal blocks continuing when the input cannot be parsed into a room code and shows an inline validation error.
category: Join Room via Landing Modal (full invite URL)

steps.description: Navigate to /
Click the control to open the Join Room modal
Fill a non-parseable string without a code into the join input
Submit the join modal
Verify an inline validation error is displayed in the join modal

title: Prevent sign-up with an email that is already registered
description: Verifies signing up with an email already in use shows a duplicate-email error toast and does not log the user in.

steps.description: Navigate to /host/auth
Switch to the sign-up view
Fill in the display name field with First Host
Fill in the email field with testhost+dupe@example.com
Fill in the password field with ValidPassword123!
Submit the sign-up form
Switch to the sign-up view
Fill in the display name field with Second Host
Fill in the email field with testhost+dupe@example.com
Fill in the password field with ValidPassword123!
Submit the sign-up form
Verify a duplicate email error toast is visible
Verify the auth gate login/sign-up form is still displayed

title: Dismiss Invite Friends modal without copying
description: This test verifies a participant can open and close the Invite Friends modal without copying and return to the live session view.

steps.description: Navigate to /host/auth
Fill {{LOGIN_USER}} into the email field
Fill {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}} into the password field
Submit the host authentication form
Create a new session from the host dashboard
Copy the join code from the host session view
Navigate to /session/{CODE}/join using the copied join code
Fill a valid display name into the display name field
Continue into the live session
Open the Invite Friends modal
Close the Invite Friends modal via the close control
Verify the participant live session view is displayed

title: Participant join modal rejects unparseable or overly long input
description: Verifies the Join Room modal blocks an unparseable or excessively long join value and shows a validation error without navigating away.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Open the Join Room modal
Fill the join input with a string longer than 512 characters
Submit the join form
Verify a join validation error is visible and the user remains in the join modal

title: Join Room modal enforces maximum input length
description: Verifies the Join Room modal prevents continuing when the pasted invite URL exceeds the allowed length and shows an inline validation error.
category: Join Room via Landing Modal (full invite URL)

steps.description: Navigate to /
Click the control to open the Join Room modal
Fill a string longer than 512 characters into the join input
Submit the join modal
Verify an inline validation error is displayed in the join modal
